name: Mohamed Sayed
heroSubtitle: Building modern, scalable web interfaces with React & TypeScript
expPoints: Built HR and ERP system interfaces using React and TypeScript
Developed delivery and landing page applications
Integrated RESTful APIs and managed state with Redux
Worked with ERPNext (JS/UI) and Jinja templating
projectsNote: Add your projects below — each with a code link and demo link.

projectDescriptions.Restaurant: Taaza is a fast and easy food delivery app that lets you discover restaurants, order your favorite meals, and get them delivered to your door in minutes. 🍔🚀
projectDescriptions.Graduation-Project: Frontend development for an electronics e-commerce platform similar to Amazon, featuring User, Vendor, and Admin roles, product browsing, shopping cart, and order management.
projectDescriptions.Memory Game: A fun and interactive Memory Game built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Players flip cards to match pairs and improve their memory skills. Features include a timer, move counter, and responsive design for all devices.
projectDescriptions.ToDo-List: A ToDo List application built with React that allows users to add, edit, and delete tasks. Features include task completion tracking, local storage to save tasks, and a clean, responsive design for all devices.
